meta.title: AI VIDEO VANGUARD
meta.subtitle: Latest on top · feed ordered by publish date

videos.title: Nexus — Wet Markets of Kafar
videos.description: Teaser for a hybrid feature film. Models: Octo + Seedance 2.0. Team: PJ Ace, Dan Weller, Karim Youssef, Stephen Quach.

videos.title: Junkyard King — EP1: "Training Day"
videos.highlight: Google Flow's first Filmmaker in Residence
videos.description: EP1 of a two-episode series (~16 min) set in the 80s: Artie, a teenager obsessed with VHS tapes and samurai movies. Made with Google Flow (Veo + Nano Banana).

videos.title: Last Forever
videos.highlight: Grand Prize — Runway Big Ad Contest
videos.description: Grand Prize winner of the Runway Big Ad Contest (products that don't exist).

videos.title: Morocco 4K — a Kling AI test
videos.description: Kling capability test: Moroccan landscapes in 4K.

videos.title: Created this for my Father using AI and a Family Portrait
videos.highlight: From a family portrait to video
videos.description: Personal piece: Dave Clark animates a family portrait as a tribute to his father. Tool unconfirmed.

videos.title: Salty
videos.description: Short film by Jordan Daniel Chesney (JDC Entertainment), a generative-AI film studio. Tool and categories unconfirmed.

videos.title: Kök Börü — Teaser
videos.description: Official teaser for an animated short (2026). Produced by Higgsfield AI.

videos.title: Zephyr — Episode 1
videos.description: First episode of an original series by Higgsfield AI (2026).

videos.title: Mork — Viking Action Series, EP1
videos.description: Episodic action series (~22 min) by Higgsfield AI, in 4K. Produced with Seedance 2.0.

videos.title: Morningstar
videos.highlight: Light as a character · Runway Gen-4
videos.description: Official Runway Studios short made with Gen-4. Worldbuilding and environment consistency in an alien landscape.

videos.title: The Chronicles of Bone — Prologue: The Chosen Knight
videos.description: Prologue of a serialized fantasy series. Produced with the Freepik/Magnific suite (routes Kling/Veo/Seedance per shot).

videos.title: The Interview (2026)
videos.description: A Seedance 2.0 (Dreamina) exploration in 4K: face-to-face dialogue drama with lipsync and facial acting. Featured by Curious Refuge.

videos.title: Dōkyō
videos.description: Piece by László Gaál (colour grading + generative AI). Tool and categories unconfirmed.

videos.title: Forever Means Forever
videos.highlight: Spec ad · Runway Big Ad Contest 2026
videos.description: Fictional-product ad (battery brief) from the Runway Big Ad Contest 2026. Runway Gen-4.

videos.description: Award-winning spec ad from the Runway Big Ad Contest 2026. Runway Gen-4.

videos.description: Fictional-product ad 'Snooze Patch' submitted to the Runway Big Ad Contest 2026.

videos.title: Washed Out — The Hardest Part
videos.highlight: First official music video made with Sora
videos.description: Official Washed Out music video directed by Paul Trillo; continuous infinite-zoom transitions. The first music video commissioned with Sora.

videos.title: Let Us Explore
videos.description: Short film that won 'Best Character' at Runway Gen:48 (2023).

videos.title: Poof
videos.description: Office short with 'puppets'. Stills in Midjourney, video in Luma Dream Machine.

videos.title: The Pisanos — Porsche (spec ad)
videos.description: Unofficial Porsche spec ad by László Gaál, viral in January 2025. Google Veo 2.

videos.title: Coca-Cola — Holidays Are Coming
videos.highlight: Real brand ad made with AI (controversial)
videos.description: Official Coca-Cola holiday ad generated with AI (several studios: Secret Level, Silverside, Wild Card). Single tool unconfirmed.

videos.title: AI Will Smith eating spaghetti
videos.description: The foundational AI-video meme. Kept here as a reference for where we came from. Not an ad.

videos.title: Children of a Dead Star — Trailer
videos.description: Trailer for a short film set in 1979 East Germany: a remote military surveillance station intercepts an alien signal. Tool unconfirmed.

videos.title: Ausencia — GEN:48 Aleph Edition
videos.description: AI-animated short made in 48h for Runway's GEN:48 Aleph challenge; a deeply emotional dialogue sequence. Won Best Animation at the Bionic Awards.

videos.title: El Forastero (The Alien)
videos.description: Dialogue-free concept teaser blending western and sci-fi around an alien stranger; 'Anirreal' aesthetic with hyperrealistic textures.

videos.title: Insane Seedance 2.0 film — AI on the Lot
videos.highlight: Seedance 2.0 demo · AI on the Lot
videos.description: Demo short generated entirely with Seedance 2.0, presented at the AI on the Lot event.

videos.title: Zelda: Breath of the Wild — R-Rated AI Trailer
videos.highlight: Fictional live-action trailer · made in 5 days
videos.description: Fictional R-rated trailer for a live-action The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild movie, made in five days with the Freepik suite.

videos.title: Kalshi — AI ad (NBA Finals)
videos.highlight: Viral ad · aired during the NBA Finals
videos.description: Kalshi ad generated with AI (Google Veo 3), chaotic GTA-style scenes, aired during the NBA Finals.

videos.description: AI cinematic piece about the 2026 World Cup. Tool unconfirmed.
